violations.text: A water purifier was observed attached to the hand-washing sink faucet. Per PIC it is used to fill customer's water. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Proper usage of hand-washing sink reviewed at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2026

Raw animal foods (container of marinated chicken) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (vegetables) in the refrigerator #1. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Staff moved raw marinated chicken to bottom shelf. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2026

Fried egg noodles were observed held at (61) degrees Fahrenheit out in room temperature. Per egg noodles package, they are to be kept refrigerated. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC voluntarily disposed of egg noodles. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2026
Employees' medicines were not stored to prevent the contamination of food, equipment, or utensils.PIC moved medicine to designated location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2026

At the time of inspection, Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses located on prep line counter. Methods for proper storage of in-use utensils were reviewed. PIC removed utensils and water at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the (refrigeration units handles and doors) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2026
The gaskets on the doors of two refrigeration units were observed in poor repair (loose and covered with tape). Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2024

The floor and wall junctures under the three bay sink and hand wash sink areas do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2024
The gaskets on the doors of two reach in refrigeration units were observed in poor repair (loose and/or covered with tape). New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the three bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2024

The following areas were lacking an air gap or had an inadequate air gap: 1) The ice machine had no air gap 2) The dish machine had no air gap 3) The food prep sink did not have an appropriate air gap A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2024

The floor and wall junctures in all areas with sinks do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2024
A hole was observed in an area where the wall the ceiling meet in the back storage area. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2024
